Preference.android:summary: Use the list below to configure which (parts of) URLs are allowed or denied to be forwarded to the internethelper add-on app. The validation is using a simple text comparison, so a part of a URL can be entered too.

ListPreference.android:summary: Set the default action to take when a URL is requested that isn't already in the list below.
ListPreference.android:title: New URL action

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Intercept supported requests
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Some internet requests can be intercepted and responded to locally without sending anything to the internet.
